title: Cuneiform Tablet #0039: Achaemenid Census
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a census document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a census document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Census document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records census matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
